notes: EmbedFilter basis is the SVD bulk slice of the BASE model unembedding (Boldt/Boldt-DC-350M lm_head), applied as a postprocessor to the fine-tuned candidate_embedder's pooled output. Compared head-to-head against prefix Matryoshka at equal dims. local_rag has no eval set on disk yet and is skipped (not fabricated).
